narratives.Overview: A purpose-built internal Sales CRM for the DEFT sales team, layered on top of the existing Thread/Message/Space architecture. Company, Contact, and Opportunity are Threads with crm_type metadata in a CRM-type Space. Record-level access control is enforced via a thread_acl table. Cross-entity relationships live in a crm_links join table. Per-rep Gmail OAuth2 handles email; sales@deft.co is a lead generation inbox. Five LLM features extend the existing LLMProvider interface.
narratives.KeyDecisions: Thread model preserved (Company/Contact/Opportunity = Threads + crm_type); thread_acl for record-level ACL; crm_links join table; crm_tasks dedicated table; per-rep Gmail OAuth2 (not shared inbox); USD only; CSV import synchronous+transactional; PDF export deferred; CEO identified by DEFT_CEO_USER_ID env var; stage probability = default per stage + per-opportunity override; custom fields via metadata JSON (no admin UI); task notifications via existing NotificationProvider; phasing = Core CRM first, then email, then reports.
narratives.Constraint: No breaking changes to existing API contracts. All new endpoints under /v1/. Backend >=85% coverage before any frontend phase begins. ACL recalculation must be atomic within the triggering transaction.

narrative.Overview: New database tables, pipeline probability extension, and config additions. All subsequent phases depend on this.

subItems.title: Subphase 1.1: Database Schema
thread_acl GORM model: id, thread_id FK, user_id, grant_type enum, created_at. Index (user_id, thread_id).
crm_links GORM model: id, from_thread_id FK, to_thread_id FK, link_type enum, is_primary bool. Unique (from, to, type).
crm_tasks GORM model: id, parent_type, parent_id, title, description, assigned_to, due_date, priority enum, status enum. Indexes on (assigned_to, status), (parent_id), (due_date, status).
crm_import_history GORM model: id, org_id FK, imported_by, entity_type, total_rows, success_count, error_count, error_detail JSON.
crm_unassigned_emails GORM model: id, inbox_id FK, assigned_user_id, gmail_message_id (UNIQUE), sender_email, subject, body_snippet, received_at.
Phase 1.1 tests: all model CRUD, constraint enforcement, ACL query construction. Fuzz >=50 inputs on ACL queries. Coverage >=85%.
Subphase 1.2: Pipeline Probability Extension

Add Probability int field to StageInfo struct. Update DefaultStages() with probabilities: NewLead=5, Contacted=15, Qualified=30, Proposal=50, Negotiation=75, ClosedWon=100, ClosedLost=0, Nurturing=10.
WeightedForecast(amountCents, probability) helper. Per-opportunity override: metadata.probability_override (0-100 int) takes precedence over stage default.
Subphase 1.3: Config & Environment
Add DEFT_CEO_USER_ID, CRMConfig{StaleOpportunityDays=30, DataQualityCheckDays=14} to existing config system. Add to secrets/secrets.example.env.

narrative.Overview: Core Company/Contact/Opportunity APIs with ACL enforcement, entity linking, and ownership reassignment. Depends on Phase 1.

subItems.title: CRM Space Initialization: EnsureCRMSpace(ctx, db, orgID) — idempotently creates CRM Space + companies/contacts/opportunities boards.
ACL Engine (api/internal/crm/acl.go): GrantOwner, RevokeOwner, GrantTaskAssignee, RevokeTaskAssignee, RecalculateLinkedContactACL, HasAccess. All mutations within caller's transaction.
FilterByACL(db, userID, isAdmin) scope joining thread_acl. Used by all CRM repositories.
Company API (crm/company/): POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /v1/orgs/{org}/crm/companies. ACL on create/read/edit. Audit log on all mutations. Duplicate check endpoint.
Contact API (crm/contact/): full CRUD + optional company_id on create (atomic crm_links + ACL). Private by default. Duplicate email check endpoint.

Opportunity API (crm/opportunity/): full CRUD. Create requires company_id. Accepts contact_ids[]+primary_contact_id. Calculates weighted_forecast on create/update. Pipeline transition endpoint with probability update, reason enforcement, close reason gate, Closed Won event.
Entity Linking API: POST/DELETE /v1/orgs/{org}/crm/links. Atomic crm_links + ACL recalculation for all link type mutations.
Ownership Reassignment: POST /v1/orgs/{org}/crm/{type}/{id}/reassign. Revoke old owner ACL, grant new owner, recalculate downstream, audit log with before/after.

Phase 2 tests: full CRUD lifecycle for all 3 entities, ACL grant/deny for every scenario, transition validation, weighted forecast math, concurrent ACL recalculation. Fuzz >=50 on request bodies. Coverage >=85%.

narrative.Overview: crm_tasks CRUD, task-driven ACL grants, notification integration, reminder background jobs, and data quality rules engine. Depends on Phase 2.

subItems.title: crm_tasks CRUD API (api/internal/crmtask/): POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /v1/orgs/{org}/crm/tasks. Task creation grants assignee ACL on parent entity. Reassign triggers ACL update. Audit log on all mutations.
Task notifications via existing NotificationProvider: task_assigned (immediate), task_due_tomorrow (24h before), task_overdue (daily while open). User preference via existing prefs page.
Task reminder background goroutine: nightly scan, fires due-tomorrow + overdue notifications. No duplicate notifications per task per day.

Data quality rules engine (crmtask/quality.go): DefaultQualityRules() — Opp missing deal_amount/expected_close_date after 48h, missing Company link, no activity in 14 days; Contact missing email/phone. Runs async on save + nightly batch.
Quality violation handler: subscribes to quality_violation event, calls LLMProvider.QualityMessage async, sends in-app notification to owner, accumulates admin digest.
Phase 3 tests: task lifecycle, ACL grant/revoke on assign/complete/cancel, notification firing, reminder scan with time-mocked tasks, quality rule evaluation, mock LLM. Coverage >=85%.

items.title: Phase 4: Gmail Integration via Existing Channel Infrastructure

narrative.Overview: Extends the existing channel package and EmailInbox model. Admin registers rep addresses in channel settings with routing_action=sales_crm. Rep connects Gmail via CRM profile OAuth flow. All email routing flows through the existing ChannelGateway.Process. No new crmail package needed.

subItems.title: Add sales_crm to RoutingAction enum. Add nullable EmailInbox fields: AssignedUserID, OAuthRefreshToken (AES-256 encrypted), PubSubSubscription, LastHistoryID. Update EmailInboxService auth to allow AssignedUserID user to PATCH own inbox credentials.

Extend Gateway.resolveThread for sales_crm routing: look up CRM Contact Thread by sender email scoped to AssignedUserID rep ACL. Matched -> route to Contact/Opportunity Thread. Unmatched -> crm_unassigned_emails. Add RoutingAction to InboundEvent.
Unassigned CRM inbox API: GET /v1/orgs/{org}/crm/email/inbox (rep-scoped), POST .../inbox/{id}/assign (link to entity Thread). Extends existing channel package.
Gmail watch lifecycle: create watch when rep stores OAuth token, store in EmailInbox.PubSubSubscription/LastHistoryID, auto-renew before 7-day expiry, stop on disconnect.

Unified Pub/Sub webhook (POST /v1/crm/email/webhook): lookup EmailInbox by email, decrypt token, fetch new messages via Gmail API, construct InboundEvent with routing_action from inbox, pass to Gateway.Process. Update LastHistoryID. Idempotent on gmail_message_id. Publish email.received for LLM.

CRM profile OAuth2 flow: GET /v1/crm/email/auth (redirect), GET /v1/crm/email/callback (find EmailInbox by assigned_user_id, store encrypted token, trigger watch), DELETE /v1/crm/email/disconnect, GET /v1/crm/email/status. Returns 400 if no inbox pre-registered by admin.
Admin channel settings UI: add sales_crm to routing action dropdown, show AssignedUserID user-picker, hide IMAP fields for sales_crm inboxes.
sales@deft.co lead gen: admin configures EmailInbox with routing_action=sales_lead. Verify Gateway sales_lead path upserts Lead record + sends admin notification. Deduplicates by sender email.

Phase 4 tests: sales_crm routing validation, Gateway routing for all 4 actions, OAuth callback token storage+encryption (mocked Google API), Gmail watch lifecycle, Pub/Sub webhook (matched+unmatched+duplicate), unassigned inbox, Lead creation/dedup. Fuzz >=50 on webhook payload. Coverage >=85%.

narrative.Overview: Extend LLMProvider interface, implement AI briefing, email summary, CEO pipeline strategy, Close This Deal Now, and data quality LLM notifications. Depends on Phases 2, 3, 4.

subItems.title: Extend LLMProvider interface with: Briefing, EmailSummary, PipelineStrategy, DealStrategy, QualityMessage. Implement all in GrokProvider. Add mock provider for tests.
AI Briefing endpoint: POST /v1/orgs/{org}/crm/ai/brief. Loads user's open Opportunities, Tasks, recent activity. Calls LLMProvider.Briefing. SSE streaming. ACL-scoped context.
Daily briefing scheduled job: for opted-in users, run briefing logic nightly at 08:00, deliver via NotificationProvider.

Deal strategy endpoint: POST /v1/orgs/{org}/crm/opportunities/{id}/strategy. Loads full Opportunity context (Thread + last 20 Messages + linked Company/Contact + Tasks + stage history). Calls LLMProvider.DealStrategy. Owner/admin only.
CEO pipeline strategy endpoint: POST /v1/orgs/{org}/crm/ai/pipeline-strategy. CEO/admin only. Loads all open Opportunities (unfiltered). Calls LLMProvider.PipelineStrategy.

Inbound email AI summary: extend Phase 4.4 webhook handler to publish async email_received event. Handler calls LLMProvider.EmailSummary(email, entityThread), delivers 1-2 line summary as system notification to assigned rep.
Phase 5 tests: all LLM endpoints with mock provider, verify context assembly (correct records passed), async email summary non-blocking, CEO gate enforced. Coverage >=85%.

items.title: Phase 6: Reports Backend — Extend Existing reporting/ Package

narrative.Overview: Extends the existing api/internal/reporting/ package (which already has GetPipelineFunnel, GetLeadVelocity, GetWinLossCounts, GetAvgDealValue, GetLeadsByAssignee, GetScoreDistribution, GetStageTransitions). New CRM queries added as new files in the same package. No crmreport/ package created. Depends on Phases 2 and 3. Can run in parallel with Phase 4.

subItems.title: repository-pipeline-crm.go (new file in reporting/): PipelineByStage (extends GetPipelineFunnel with USD value + weighted forecast), PipelineByOwner (extends GetLeadsByAssignee with amounts), PipelineByCloseDate, OverdueOpportunities. ACL-scoped via FilterByACL.

repository-forecast.go (new file in reporting/): ForecastByOwner, ForecastByStage, ForecastAccuracy. Weighted forecast = deal_amount * effective_probability / 100. Distinct from existing lead_score queries.
repository-activity.go (new file in reporting/): ActivityByUser (Messages + crm_tasks join), TasksOverdue, TasksCompleted.
repository-performance.go (new file in reporting/): WinRate (extends GetWinLossCounts), AvgSalesCycle (extends GetStageTransitions audit log pattern), ConversionByStage, SourcePerformance.
repository-entities.go (new file in reporting/): CompaniesByStatus, ContactsByCompany (via crm_links), RecentlyModified. ACL-scoped.
repository-smtm.go (new file in reporting/): SMTM Section 1 (metric cards, deals-closing-soon, funnel), Section 2 (all open Opps, pipeline stats, top 10, stalled). No ACL. CEO/admin gate.
Extend existing reporting/handler.go: add /v1/orgs/{org}/reports/crm/{type} route group alongside existing /reports/sales and /reports/support. ?format=csv export. Existing routes unaffected.
Phase 6 tests: all new queries with fixture data, ACL scoping, weighted forecast math, CSV correctness, CEO gate. Confirm existing reporting/ tests still pass. Coverage >=85%.

narrative.Overview: Two-step synchronous CSV import for Companies and Contacts. Preview, validate, apply in single transaction, import history log. Depends on Phase 2. Can be developed in parallel with Phases 4-6.

subItems.title: Import parser (crmimport/parser.go): POST /v1/orgs/{org}/crm/import/preview — parse CSV, validate (required fields, email format, field length, duplicate detection), return {valid_rows, error_rows, duplicate_warnings}. No DB writes. Fuzz >=50 CSV inputs.

Import apply (POST /v1/orgs/{org}/crm/import/apply): execute valid_rows in single DB transaction with ACL grants. Write crm_import_history on success or rollback. Owner from CSV owner_email or importing user.
Phase 7 tests: validation catches all error types, rollback on failure, history written, ACL grants created. Fuzz >=50 on CSV parser. Coverage >=85%.

narrative.Overview: Auto-creates a support ticket on Closed Won with full Company/Contact/Opportunity details. Notifies support + finance. Failure is non-blocking. Depends on Phase 2.

subItems.title: HandoffService (api/internal/crmhandoff/): subscribes to PipelineStageChanged event. On closed_won: load Opp + Company + primary Contact + last 5 Messages. Call support.Service.CreateTicket. Notify support_team_user_ids (assignees) + finance_team_user_ids (copy). Notify Opp owner. On failure: audit log + admin alert; do NOT roll back stage transition.

Phase 8 tests: handoff creates correct ticket, support+finance notified, owner notified, failure path non-blocking, stage transition succeeds even on ticket failure. Integration test with mock support service. Coverage >=85%.

narrative.Overview: CRM navigation, Company/Contact/Opportunity list and detail views, manual entry forms with duplicate detection, activity timeline. Depends on Phases 2 and 3.

subItems.title: Sidebar CRM nav section: Companies, Contacts, Pipeline, Inbox, Import, Reports. CRM breadcrumb support. Nav visible to DEFT sales org members only.
Company list (sortable/filterable table, cursor pagination) + detail (attributes, linked Contacts panel, Opp summary, activity timeline).
Company create/edit form: all attributes, real-time duplicate name check, warning dialog on duplicate.
Contact list + detail (parent Company link, Opp list, activity timeline). Contact not visible to non-owner/non-linked rep.
Contact create/edit form: all attributes, Company association picker, email duplicate check.
Opportunity Kanban pipeline view (columns=stages, cards=leads with metadata) + list view. Drag-and-drop transitions. Overdue indicators. Filters.

Opportunity detail page: metadata sidebar (including probability override), activity timeline, tasks panel, stage indicator (days-in-stage, age, overdue), all action buttons (advance/close/create task/note/attach/reassign/edit/CTDN).
Opportunity create/edit form: Company picker (required), Contact picker (primary+secondary), deal amount, close date, type, lead source, stage, probability override.
Phase 9 tests: Vitest component tests, Playwright E2E (sign-in -> Company -> Contact -> Opportunity -> pipeline -> close won), ACL enforcement E2E (rep A cannot see rep B's Contact). Coverage >=85%.

narrative.Overview: Gmail OAuth configuration UI, Tiptap email composer in entity views, unassigned inbox view, task management UI, notification preferences. Depends on Phase 4 and Phase 9.

subItems.title: Gmail OAuth config UI in CRM profile settings: Connect button (triggers OAuth flow), connected state (email address + disconnect button).

Tiptap email composer component embedded in Company/Contact/Opp detail pages: to/cc/bcc/subject/body, file attachment (existing upload), signature selector, template picker. Sends via /crm/email/send. Shows 'Connect Gmail first' if not connected.
Unassigned inbox view (/crm/inbox): list of unmatched emails, assign-to-entity modal, thread preview. Nav badge with unread count.
Task slide-over panel: create/edit task (title, description, assignee picker, due date, priority, status). Task list on each entity detail page. Global My Tasks view.
Notification preferences: add task event toggles (task_assigned, task_due_tomorrow, task_overdue) and daily AI briefing opt-in to existing preferences page.
Phase 10 tests: Vitest component tests for email composer and task panel. Playwright E2E (connect Gmail -> send email -> email in timeline; create task -> assignee notified). Coverage >=85%.

narrative.Overview: Brief Me panel, Close This Deal Now slide-over, CEO strategic analysis section. Depends on Phase 5 and Phase 9.

subItems.title: Brief Me panel: floating button/sidebar widget in CRM dashboard. Calls /crm/ai/brief, streams response in slide-over with loading state. Lists prioritized items, CTDN shortcut per Opportunity.
Close This Deal Now slide-over: from Opportunity detail, calls /crm/opportunities/{id}/strategy, streams response, Save as Note button persists Message(type=note) on Thread.

CEO strategic analysis in Show Me the Money report: Generate Strategic Analysis button (CEO/admin only) calls /crm/ai/pipeline-strategy, renders streaming response in report section. Regenerate supported.
Phase 11 tests: Vitest component tests, streaming response rendering, CEO gate (non-CEO cannot see Generate button), Save as Note creates Message. Coverage >=85%.

narrative.Overview: Extends existing /reports/sales/page.tsx (which already has PipelineFunnelChart, LeadVelocityChart, LeadsByAssigneeChart, ScoreDistributionChart, StageConversionChart, TimeInStageChart, DateRangePicker, AssigneeFilter, ExportButton). No /reports/crm/ route created. New tabs and sections added to the existing page. Show Me the Money at /reports/sales/show-me-the-money.

subItems.title: Extend /reports/sales/page.tsx: add tab nav (Pipeline, Forecasting, Activity, Performance, Company/Contact). Existing pipeline charts become sub-sections of Pipeline tab. Extend filter bar with stage, opportunity type, lead source. Role-based data scoping.
Pipeline & Forecasting tab views: reuse existing PipelineFunnelChart; add Pipeline by Owner/Close Date tables, Overdue list, Forecast by Owner/Stage cards, Forecast Accuracy line chart.

Activity, Performance & Entity tab views: Activity Summary table, Tasks Overdue/Completed, Win Rate cards+chart, Avg Sales Cycle, Conversion by Stage funnel, Source Performance, Company/Contact reports.

Show Me the Money (/reports/sales/show-me-the-money): CEO/admin only. Reuses existing PipelineFunnelChart. Section 1 (metric cards, deals-closing-soon table, funnel, total closing). Section 2 (all open Opps, stats, top 10, stalled). LLM strategic analysis (Phase 11.3). CSV export.

Phase 12 tests: confirm existing chart component tests still pass; Vitest for new components; Playwright E2E (access control, filter updates, SMTM at /reports/sales/show-me-the-money, CEO gate, CSV export). Coverage >=85%.

narrative.Overview: CSV import UI with upload, preview, confirm, and history. Depends on Phase 7 and Phase 9.

subItems.title: Import UI (/crm/import): drag-drop file upload, entity type selector (Company/Contact), preview table (valid=green, error=red with per-row detail, duplicate=amber), confirm button, progress, success/error summary, import history table.
Phase 13 tests: Vitest component tests, Playwright E2E (upload CSV -> preview -> confirm -> records visible in list). Coverage >=85%.
